title: Polymer Materials for High‐Performance Triboelectric Nanogenerators - PMC
excerpts:
Section Title: Polymer Materials for High‐Performance Triboelectric Nanogenerators > Biographies
Content:
**Zhong Lin Wang** is the Hightower Chair in Materials Science and Engineering and Regents’ Professor at Georgia Tech, and Founding Director of the Beijing Institute of Nanoenergy and Nanosystems. Dr. Wang pioneered nanogenerators from fundamental science to technological applications. His research on self‐powered nanosystems has inspired the worldwide effort in academia and industry for studying energy for micro/nanosystems. He coined and pioneered the fields of piezotronics and piezo‐phototronics for third‐generation semiconductors.
Chen A., Zhang C., Zhu G., Wang Z. L., Polymer Materials for High‐Performance Triboelectric Nanogenerators. Adv. Sci.
2020, 7, 2000186
10.1002/advs.202000186

title: Prof. Zhong Lin WANG - IEEE Open Journal of Nanotechnology
excerpts:
Section Title: Prof. Zhong Lin WANG
Content:
Prof. Zhong Lin Wang is the Hightower Chair in Materials Science and Engineering and Regents’ Professor at Georgia Tech，and Founding Director and Chief Scientist at Beijing Institute of Nanoenergy and Nanosystems. He pioneered the nanogenerators from fundamental principle to technological applications. His research on self-powered nanosystems has inspired the worldwide effort in academia and industry for studying energy for micro-nano-systems. He coined and pioneered the fields of piezotronics and piezo-phototronics for the third generation semiconductors. He is ranked No. 1 in Google Scholar public profiles in Nanotechnology & Nanoscience both in total citations and h-index impacts. His google scholar citation is over 200,000 with an h-index of over 225.
